element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn that blowing bubbles traps enemies
Progressively more difficult enemy combinations introduced across the 100 levels
Enemies drop bonus items when they hit the ground after bubble pop
Each of 100 levels becomes progressively more difficult

typical_relief_triggers: Collecting bonus items from defeated enemies
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Progressive difficulty escalation across 100 levels with continuous enemy engagement and bubble-trapping gameplay loops

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like introduction to bubble trapping mechanic with basic enemy patterns
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive increase in enemy complexity and spatial challenge across mid-tier levels
difficulty_curve.late_game: High difficulty with complex enemy combinations across levels 50-100
notable_spikes: Steady incremental progression rather than discrete difficulty spikes

notable_level_patterns.description: Core gameplay loop: players blow bubbles to trap enemies, then pop the bubbles to defeat them and collect bonus items
As players advance through the 100 levels, enemy types and behavioral patterns become increasingly difficult and varied
Game designed around simultaneous two-player gameplay where second player (Bob) can be controlled by inserting another coin
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All levels support two-player simultaneous play
